top_signals.title: Analysis: An end to the Iran war may be just the beginning of a new era of U.S. inequality
top_signals.summary: Stocks have boomed while consumers have paid the costs of high energy prices.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Trump yet to make ‘final determination’ on Iran war despite discussions
top_signals.summary: US president Donald Trump is yet to make his ‘final determination’ on the war in Iran, despite holding a meeting with advisers on Friday to reach a decision on extending the ceasefire. Trump is yet to decide whether to move forward with a deal to extend the Iran ceasefire and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: NATO military chief presses UK to accelerate defence pledges
top_signals.summary: Nato’s military chief has urged Britain and other allies to speed up the delivery of their defence pledges.  Admiral Giuseppe Cavo Dragone, Nato’s military committee chair, said he is “frustrated” by the UK and its allies’ commitments to spend on defence which he said do not stand if there is no equipment to show for [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: XRP ETFs add $35 million as bitcoin and ether funds lost $2 billion in late May
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Meta has struggled at selling anything other than ads. Will AI be different?
top_signals.summary: Meta is making a major push to expand its business beyond online advertising, but past efforts show that success is far from guaranteed.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
